{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Eithan's sword strike
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] has a [[sword]] strike that [[Yerin]] tried to learn.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
